result.markdown: # Toxicokinetics of Epoxiconazole - 2 compartment & Exposure in Petri dishes (Gut route = 30%) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_TK_EPX <- f_read_data_TK("EPX") %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ na_if(.x, -1))) df_TK_EPX <- df_TK_EPX |> mutate( Time = t, CiIMD = C_worm_IMD, CiEPX = C_worm_EPX, Weight = Weight_nog, Time_point_f = as.factor(Time_point) ) |> dplyr::select(Time, CiEPX, CiIMD, Weight, w, Molecule, ID, expo, Time_point_f) |> mutate( CiEPX = na_if(CiEPX, -1), CiIMD = na_if(CiIMD, -1) ) df_TK_EPX_mean <- df_TK_EPX |> dplyr::select(-ID) |> group_by(Time) |> summarise( CiEPX = exp(mean(log(CiEPX[CiEPX > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)), CiIMD = exp(mean(log(CiIMD[CiIMD > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)), Weight = mean(Weight, na.rm = TRUE), w = mean(w, na.rm = TRUE), expo = mean(expo), .groups = "drop" ) |> mutate(Molecule = "EPX") ``` ::: ::: {.cell code-show='show'} ```{.r .cell-code} Molecule <- "EPX" path_mod_EPX <- here::here("mod/TK_EPX_2comp30") path_fig <- here::here("fig/TK_single/EPX_2Comp30/") Nb_Iter <- 100000 seeds <- c(C1 = 3269, C2 = 6666, C3 = 1392) text_priors <- "Distrib(kuEPX, LogUniform, 0.00001, 100000); # min, max Distrib(keEPX, LogUniform, 0.00001, 100000); # min, max Distrib(kperiph, LogUniform, 0.00001, 100000); # min, max Distrib(a_growth, TruncNormal, 0.005, 0.005, -0.5, 1); # mean, sd, min, max Distrib (Vr_a_growth, TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.0015, 0, 1); Distrib(Sigma_W, TruncNormal, 0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1); Distrib(Sigma_CiEPX, TruncNormal, 3.0, 3.0, 1, 1000);" text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiEPX, LogNormal, Prediction(CiEPX), Sigma_CiEPX); # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation) Likelihood(Weight, Normal, Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W); # Calcul des vraisemblances" text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth, TruncNormal, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);" f_In_tot(path_mod_EPX, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execute='false'} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_EPX pwd makemcsim m_TK_EPX.model & wait ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_C1.in & ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_C2.in & ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_C3.in & wait ``` ::: The first step is to retrieve the information of the MCMC simulation experiments. The inputs : - Input files must a name like "xxxxx.1.in" - Output files must a name like "xxxxx.1.out" ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} MCMC_out_EPX <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_EPX) NC <- MCMC_out_EPX$NC Nb_param <- MCMC_out_EPX$Nb_param Nb_experiement <- MCMC_out_EPX$Nb_experiement Nb_iter_kept <- MCMC_out_EPX$Nb_iter_kept N_iter_setpoint <- MCMC_out_EPX$N_iter_setpoint L_parameters <- unique(MCMC_out_EPX$Priors$Nom) ``` ::: We can retrieve different information from the model : - The number of chains used : 3 - The number of parameters : 7 - The number of experiments : 62 - The number of last iterations used to describe the posterior distribution : 10^{4} - The number of last iterations used to create the `tab_setpoint.out` file : 333 Warning : Run the command `./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint.in` in the terminal while being in the folder `mod/TK_EPX` to create the `Setpoints.out` now. Do the same with `./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind.in` to create the `Setpoints_ind.out` and with `./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind_full.in` to create the `Setpoints_ind_full.out`. ## Priors used for the model ::: {.cell tbl-cap='Priors used for the model' tbl-label='tbl-EPXPriors'} ```{.r .cell-code} #colnames(MCMC_out_EPX$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "Mean", "Sd", "Min", "Max") # MCMC_out_EPX$Priors |> datatable( # options = list( # dom = 't', # autoWidth = TRUE, # columnDefs = list( # list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all") # ) # ), # class="hover" # ) MCMC_out_EPX$Priors ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Nom Distribution P1 P2 P3 P4 1 kuEPX LogUniform 0.00001 1.0e+05 NA NA 2 keEPX LogUniform 0.00001 1.0e+05 NA NA 3 kperiph LogUniform 0.00001 1.0e+05 NA NA 4 a_growth TruncNormal 0.00500 5.0e-03 -5e-01 1 5 Vr_a_growth TruncNormal 0.00150 1.5e-03 0e+00 1 6 Sigma_W TruncNormal 0.03000 1.0e-02 1e-04 1 7 Sigma_CiEPX TruncNormal 3.00000 3.0e+00 1e+00 1000 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution df_priors_dist <- MCMC_out_EPX$Priors |> dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> rowwise() |> mutate(samples = case_when( Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)), Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)), Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))), Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2)) )) |> unnest(samples) |> filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuEPX", "keEPX","kperiph") & samples > 0.01)) col_prior <- Nord_polar[4] alpha_prior <- 0.5 p_priors <- ggplot() + facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+ stat_halfeye( data = df_priors_dist, aes( x = samples ), alpha = alpha_prior, fill = col_prior, color = col_prior, normalize = "xy" ) + labs( title = "Priors distributions", x = "Parameter value", y = "Density" ) + theme_minimal() p_priors ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Distributions of the priors.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXprior-1.png){#fig-EPXprior width=768} ::: ::: ## Chains ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} p_chains <- ggplot( data = MCMC_out_EPX$Chains, aes( x = Iteration, y = value, color = as.factor(Chain), group = as.factor(Chain) ) )+ geom_line(alpha=0.7)+ scale_y_log10()+ facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+ scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+ theme_bw()+ theme( legend.position = "right", title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"), strip.background = element_rect(fill="white") ) p_chains ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXchains-1.png){#fig-EPXchains width=768} ::: ::: We can also take a look at the likelihood and the deviance ratio. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} p1 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_EPX$df_LnPost_start, aes( x = iteration, y = LnPosterior, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = "First half iterations", y = "LnPosterior" ) + theme_minimal() p2 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_EPX$df_LnPost, aes( x = iteration, y = LnPosterior, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), y = "LnPosterior" ) + theme_minimal() p3 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_EPX$df_Devc, aes( x = iteration, y = RatioDeviance, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), y = "Ratio Deviance" ) + theme_minimal() p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect") p_LL ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXlike-1.png){#fig-EPXlike width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Large format per chain mcmc_list <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_EPX$Chains, MCMC_out_EPX$Chains$Chain), function(d) { wide <- d %>% dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>% arrange(Iteration) mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1])) }) mcmc_list <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} par(mfrow=c(1,3)) gelman.plot(mcmc_list, bin.width = 10, # Number of observations per segment, # first segment --> at least 50 iterations. max.bins = 50, # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one confidence = 0.95, # Coverage probability of confidence interval. transform = FALSE, # improve the normality of the distribution autoburnin=TRUE) # Remove first half of sequence gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE) print(gelman) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Potential scale reduction factors: Point est. Upper C.I. a_growth.1. 1.02 1.03 keEPX.1. 1.16 1.48 kperiph.1. 1.11 1.36 kuEPX.1. 1.16 1.46 Sigma_CiEPX.1. 1.00 1.00 Sigma_W.1. 1.03 1.08 Vr_a_growth.1. 1.12 1.30 Multivariate psrf 1.16 ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Chains convergence.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXchainsconvergence-1.png){#fig-EPXchainsconvergence width=768} ::: ::: Chains converged. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list( lapply(mcmc_list, function(x) { mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE]) # <- reconvertir en mcmc }) ) colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4])) ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Parameter correlations.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-corr-1.png){#fig-corr width=576} ::: ::: ## Parameter estimation results ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_prior <- 0.5 alpha_post <- 0.5 col_prior <- Nord_snow[1] col_post <- col_EPX MCMC_out_EPX$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_EPX$Chains |> mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> filter(!((Nom %in% c("kperiph") & value > 0.02)))|> filter(!((Nom %in% c("kuEPX") & value > 10))) p_post <- ggplot() + # Priors stat_halfeye( data = df_priors_dist, aes( x = samples, #y = ..scaled.. ), alpha = alpha_prior, fill = col_prior, color = col_prior, normalize = "xy" ) + # Posterior stat_halfeye( data = subset(MCMC_out_EPX$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters), mapping = aes( x=value ), fill = col_post, color = col_post, alpha = alpha_post, normalize = "xy" ) + facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+ labs( title = "Posterior and prior distributions", x = "Parameter value", y = "Density" ) + theme_minimal()+ theme( title=element_markdown(face="bold") ) p_post ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXpost-1.png){#fig-EPXpost width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} f_get_mode <- function(x) { ux <- unique(x) ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))] } MCMC_out_EPX$Chains <- MCMC_out_EPX$Chains |> mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) ku_samples <- MCMC_out_EPX$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuEPX") ke_samples <- MCMC_out_EPX$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keEPX") BCF_samples <- ku_samples$value / ke_samples$value BCF_mode <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples) BCF_CI <- quantile(BCF_samples, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)) BCF_CI_low <- as.numeric(BCF_CI[1]) BCF_CI_up <- as.numeric(BCF_CI[2]) BCF_min <- min(BCF_samples) BCF_max <- max(BCF_samples) BCF_mean <- mean(BCF_samples) BCF_sd <- sd(BCF_samples) BCF <- c( BCF_mode, BCF_CI_low, BCF_CI_up, BCF_min, BCF_max, BCF_mean, BCF_sd ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell tbl-cap='Results summary' tbl-label='tbl-EPXressum'} ```{.r .cell-code} Summary_res_EPX_tmp <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_EPX$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters)], BCF) Summary_res_EPX_f <- Summary_res_EPX_tmp |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2)) # Summary_res_EPX_f |> datatable( # options = list( # dom = 't', # autoWidth = TRUE, # columnDefs = list( # list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all") # ) # ), # class="hover" # ) Summary_res_EPX_f ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` kuEPX.1. keEPX.1. kperiph.1. a_growth.1. Vr_a_growth.1. Sigma_W.1. Result_mode 2.20 1.7000 5.1e-05 0.00350 0.00130 0.0490 2.5% 1.80 1.5000 3.6e-05 0.00290 0.00120 0.0420 97.5% 3.70 1.9000 6.1e-05 0.00420 0.00300 0.0560 Min 0.18 0.0022 2.1e-05 -0.00530 0.00026 0.0220 Max 4.60 2.0000 1.4e-03 0.00640 0.00570 0.0620 Result_mean 2.60 1.7000 4.8e-05 0.00360 0.00180 0.0490 Result_sd 0.48 0.0890 9.9e-06 0.00032 0.00046 0.0036 Sigma_CiEPX.1. BCF Result_mode 1.30 1.40 2.5% 1.20 1.20 97.5% 1.30 2.00 Min 1.20 0.98 Max 4.90 630.00 Result_mean 1.30 1.50 Result_sd 0.03 3.60 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # BIC calculation LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_EPX$df_LnPost$LnPosterior) n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$CiEPX)) k <- Nb_param -2 BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n) cat("n = ", n,"\nk = ", k, "\nLL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` n = 310 k = 5 LL = 0.00279186 BIC = 28.67728 ``` ::: ::: ## Comparison of observed vs. predicted data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} l_param_name <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth" f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_EPX,Molecule, l_param_name) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execute='false'} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_EPX pwd for j in $(seq 1 62); do ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind_${j}.in done ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} dObs_ind <- df_TK_EPX |> mutate( ID = as.numeric(ID), Group = case_when( ID < 65 ~ "Uptake", ID > 64 ~ "Elimination" ) ) colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiEPX"] <- "CiEPX_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times" col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2]) Sim.Res.ind <- lapply(1:62, function(j) { read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>% mutate(sim = j) }) %>% bind_rows() df_mod_ind <- NULL for (i in 1:Nb_experiement){ ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i] Sim.Res.ind_i <- subset(Sim.Res.ind, sim == i) |> dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x)))) dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i) Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!! Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX") Nsortie = 2 MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025, na.rm=TRUE) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint ) df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>% mutate(ID=ID_i) df_mod_ind <- rbind(df_mod_ind, df_mod_ind_i) } df_mod_Weight_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "Weight") df_mod_CiEPX_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "CiEPX") df_predobs_CiEPX_ind <- dObs_ind |> left_join(df_mod_CiEPX_ind, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiIMD)) |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() df_predobs_Weight_ind <- dObs_ind |> filter(!(expo == 2)) |> left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|> dplyr::select(-c(CiEPX_obs, CiIMD)) |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fact_1 <- 2 fact_2 <- 5 col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1] col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4] col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1] seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001) df_line <- data.frame( x1 = seq_line, y1 = seq_line*fact_1, x_1 = seq_line, y_1 = seq_line/fact_1, x2 = seq_line, y2 = seq_line*fact_2, x_2 = seq_line, y_2 = seq_line/fact_2 ) p_W <- ggplot( data = df_predobs_Weight_ind, mapping = aes( x = Weight_obs, y = predict.endpoint ) )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_abline( slope=1, intercept = 0, color = col_line0, linewidth = 1 )+ geom_pointrange( mapping = aes( ymin = low, ymax = up ), alpha = 0.5, color = col_EPX )+ xlim( xmin = 0.5, xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) )+ ylim( ymin = 0.5, ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind$predict.endpoint) )+ scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+ scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+ labs( x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)", y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)" )+ theme_minimal() fact_1 <- 2 fact_2 <- 5 seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01) df_line <- data.frame( x1 = seq_line, y1 = seq_line*fact_1, x_1 = seq_line, y_1 = seq_line/fact_1, x2 = seq_line, y2 = seq_line*fact_2, x_2 = seq_line, y_2 = seq_line/fact_2 ) p_CiEPX_predobs <- ggplot( data = df_predobs_CiEPX_ind, mapping = aes( x = CiEPX_obs, y = predict.endpoint ) )+ geom_path( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_abline( slope=1, intercept = 0, color = col_line0, linewidth = 1 )+ geom_pointrange( mapping = aes( ymin = low, ymax = up, color = Group ), alpha = 0.5#, #color = col_EPX )+ xlim( xmin = 0.5, xmax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind$CiEPX_obs) )+ ylim( ymin = 0.5, ymax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind$predict.endpoint) )+ labs( x = "Observed concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)", y = "Predicted concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)" )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure )+ scale_x_log10( #limits=c(1, 500) )+ scale_y_log10( #limits=c(1, 500) )+ theme_minimal() p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiEPX_predobs p_predobs ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXpredobs-1.png){#fig-EPXpredobs width=576} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_predobs_Weight_ind <- df_predobs_Weight_ind |> mutate( Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs, Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs ) Weight_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) * 100 Weight_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) * 100 df_predobs_CiEPX_ind <- df_predobs_CiEPX_ind |> mutate( Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiEPX_obs, Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiEPX_obs ) CiEPX_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind$CiEPX_obs) * 100 CiEPX_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind$CiEPX_obs) * 100 cat( "For weights : \n\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2, 1), "%\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5, 1), "%" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` For weights : Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = 100 % Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = 100 % ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat( "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold2, 1), "%\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold5, 1), "%" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` For internal concentrations : Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = 96.8 % Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = 100 % ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_residuals_CiEPX <- df_predobs_CiEPX_ind |> mutate( Residual = predict.endpoint - CiEPX_obs, Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiEPX_obs ) |> mutate( Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)), Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination")), Time_relative = case_when( Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point, Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21 ) ) p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiEPX)+ geom_point( aes( x = Time_point, y = Ratio_Residual, color = Group ), alpha=0.7 )+ labs( x = "Time point (days)", y = "Predicted/observed ratio" )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure )+ #facet_wrap(~Group)+ scale_x_continuous( breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiEPX$Time_point) )+ scale_y_log10()+ theme_minimal() p_residus ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Residuals](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/fig-EPXresiduals-1.png){#fig-EPXresiduals width=576} ::: ::: ## Full individual trajectories ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Time_min <- 0 Time_max <- 44 Time_step <- 0.25 Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step) print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ") Molecule <- "EPX" l_param_name <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth" f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_EPX, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_EPX pwd for j in $(seq 1 62); do ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind_full_${j}.in done ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} dObs_ind <- df_TK_EPX |> mutate(ID = as.numeric(ID)) colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiEPX"] <- "CiEPX_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times" nb_rows_ind <- NC*N_iter_setpoint+1 Sim.Res.ind.full <- lapply(1:62, function(j) { read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>% mutate(sim = j) }) %>% bind_rows() df_mod_ind <- NULL for (i in 1:Nb_experiement){ ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i] Sim.Res.ind.full_i <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full, sim == i) |> dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x)))) dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i) Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX", "C_exposure") Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints) MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025, na.rm=TRUE) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint ) df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>% mutate(ID=ID_i) df_mod_ind <- rbind(df_mod_ind, df_mod_ind_i) } df_mod_Weight_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "Weight") df_mod_CiEPX_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "CiEPX") df_mod_CeEPX_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "C_exposure") time_limits <- dObs_ind %>% group_by(ID) %>% summarise(time_cutoff = max(Time, na.rm = TRUE) + 5) df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t <- df_mod_CiEPX_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) df_mod_Weight_ind_t <- df_mod_Weight_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t <- df_mod_CeEPX_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} y_segment <- 3600 df_phases <- dObs_ind |> arrange(ID, Time) |> group_by(ID) |> mutate( row = row_number(), t_start = Time, t_end = lead(Time), segment = row, y = y_segment ) |> filter(!is.na(t_end)) |> dplyr::select(ID, segment, t_start, t_end, y) |> ungroup() |> mutate( Phase = case_when( (segment == 1 & ID < 65) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & ID < 65) ~ 3, (segment == 1 & ID > 64) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & ID > 64) ~ 2, (segment == 3 & ID > 64) ~ 3 ) ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-EPXdatapredfull'} ```{.r .cell-code} library(ggforce) ID_tri <- c(1, 9, 17, 25, 33, 41, 49, 57, 65, 73, 81, 89, 97, 107, 115, 123) #ID_tri <- unique(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t$ID) dObs_ind_plot <- dObs_ind |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() |> filter(ID %in% ID_tri) df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) df_phases_plot <- subset(df_phases, ID %in% ID_tri) alpha_point <- 0.5 col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4]) p_CiEPX_traj <- ggplot()+ geom_segment( data = df_phases_plot, aes( x = t_start, xend = t_end, y = y, yend = y, group = ID, color = factor(Phase) ), lwd = 3, alpha = 0.7 ) + # geom_line( # data=df_mod_CeEPX_ind_t_plot, # aes( # x=Time, # y= predict.endpoint, # group = ID # ), # color = Nord_polar[4], # lwd=1 # )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= low, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= up, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint, group = ID ), color = col_EPX, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_CiEPX_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low, group = ID ), fill = col_EPX, alpha=0.1 )+ geom_point( data = dObs_ind_plot, aes( x = Time, y = CiEPX_obs ), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = col_red )+ #scale_y_log10()+ # facet_wrap( # ~ID, # ncol=8, # scales = "free_x", # )+ facet_wrap_paginate( ~ID, #ncol = 4, ncol=4, nrow = 4, scales = "free_x", page = 1 )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure, label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"), name = "Phase" )+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "CiEPX (ng/g)" )+ #lims(y=c(0, 300))+ theme_minimal() p_CiEPX_traj ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/EPXpredcurvesdata-1.png){width=768} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} p_CiEPX_traj_log <- p_CiEPX_traj + scale_y_log10() p_CiEPX_traj_log ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 1000 ng/g of EPX. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/EPXpredcurvesdata-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-EPXdatapredfullW'} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_point <- 0.5 p_W <- ggplot()+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= low, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= up, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint, group = ID ), color = col_EPX, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low, group = ID ), fill = col_EPX, alpha=0.1 )+ geom_point( data = dObs_ind_plot, aes( x = Time, y = Weight_obs ), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = col_red )+ facet_wrap( ~ID, ncol = 4, scales = "free" )+ #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "Weight (g)" )+ theme_minimal() p_W ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Weight predictions](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/EPXpredcurvesdataW-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ## Simulation of the toxicodynamic in earthworms throughout the exposition The goal here is to recreate the concentration dynamic in the average earthworm during our exposition scheme but without the fasting phase that was required for chemical analysis and during which elimination was happening. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Time_min <- 0 Time_max <- 42 Time_step <- 0.25 Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step) print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ") l_param_name_tot <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiEPX" f_Setpoint(path_mod_EPX, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_EPX pwd ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint.in wait ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Sim.Res <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_EPX, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t")) Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiEPX_1", "C_exposure_1") Nsortie = 3 MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res), fixed=FALSE ) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint, Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie)) ) df_mod_Weight <- subset(df_mod, Endpt == "Weight_1") df_mod_CiEPX <- subset(df_mod, Endpt == "CiEPX_1") # length(MPV) # length(df_Cin$Time) # length(Endpoint) # length(df_Cin$Experiment) ``` ::: ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-EPXcurvemod'} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_point <- 0.5 p_CiEPX <- ggplot()+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX, aes( x=Time, y= low ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX, aes( x=Time, y= up ), linetype="dotted", color = col_EPX )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiEPX, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint ), color = col_EPX, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_CiEPX, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low ), fill = col_EPX, alpha=0.1 )+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "Internal EPX concentration (ng/g)" )+ theme_minimal() p <- p_CiEPX p ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of EPX. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model.](BD_TK_EPX_2comp30_files/figure-html/EPXpredcurves-1.png){width=768} ::: :::
